title: Explore Microsoft apps, products, and devices – AI apps, cloud security, and more | Microsoft
text:
Animation

On

Microsoft products, apps, and devices built to support you

Stay on track, express your creativity, get your game on, and more—all while staying safer online. Whatever the day brings, Microsoft apps, products, and devices can help you make the most of it. Find the tools you need—from AI apps to online gaming—all from Microsoft.

Get to know Copilot

Find the right information, create unique content, and get things done faster.

Try Copilot now

Get to know Copilot

Meet your everyday AI companion

Find the right information, create unique content, and get things done faster.

Try Copilot now

Use Copilot on your phone

Access the power of AI wherever you go.

Download now

Do more with Copilot

Copilot helps you write, create, learn, shop, and stay organized with personalized AI support across your devices, select apps, and everyday tasks.

Learn more

Try Copilot

Download Copilot

Learn more about Copilot

Protect what’s important online

Focus on what really matters while our trusted technology helps keep your data, devices, files, and photos safer. With cloud security and built-in app protections, you can do more and worry less because you know you’re covered.

Microsoft Defender

Simplify your online security with one easy-to-use app2

Download now

Learn more

OneDrive

Securely save and edit your files and photos across devices

Download now

Learn more

Passkey

Replace passwords with simpler, safer, phishing-resistant sign in

Learn more

Smarter, not harder

Access familiar Microsoft program and tools that take care of the busy work so you can stay organized, get things done, and move on to the fun stuff. From mobile apps to new-and-improved productivity tools, it’s time to work smarter, wherever you are.

Windows

Tackle tasks with the world’s most-used operating system

Learn more

Word

Elevate your writing and create beautiful documents

Download now

Learn more

Excel

Simplify complex data and create easy-to-read spreadsheets

Download now

Learn more

Outlook

Streamline your email accounts and calendars in one app

Download now

Learn more

Microsoft 365 mobile app

Use Word, Excel, and PowerPoint in one mobile app

Learn more

Bring your ideas to life

Spark your imagination and realize your creative vision with Microsoft products and AI apps designed to help you turn your ideas into extraordinary images, videos, and more.

Microsoft Designer

Create unique designs and edit photos in seconds with AI

Download now

Learn more

Download now

Learn more

Download now

Learn more

Download now

Learn more

Discover your next favorite game. Unlock new worlds. Leap. Transform. Explore. Conquer. Power your dreams with games on Xbox and beyond.

Make connections and grow your skills. Stay in touch, surf, share, shop, and find the answers you need with AI-powered search.

Better together

Microsoft apps, devices, and services work together to save you time so you do what matters to you.

Microsoft cloud storage

Backup your PC and save files, photos, and even Xbox captures

Meet our most powerful Surface yet. This 14.4” device3 seamlessly transitions from laptop to angled display.
